message:
bd-6sqaq: add diagram search & filter with dimming

Implement interactive search within rendered Mermaid diagrams:
- `/` opens search input bar, type to filter nodes by label/id
- Matching nodes highlight via existing selection overlay
- Non-matching node cells dim to ~33% brightness when search active
- Enter/n cycles forward, N cycles backward through matches
- Backspace edits query, Esc exits search mode
- Search bar shows query + match count "[2/5]"
- Viewport-aware dimming using layout bounding box math
- Updated test: search mode now captures char input (not ignores)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
